topic: My wardrobe smells of an old woman's perfume that fades by noon.
title: The Perfume In My Wardrobe | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My wardrobe smelled of an old woman's perfume every morning.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an open vintage wooden wardrobe with hanging clothes, dim bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought the wardrobe secondhand for my new flat.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a tall antique wardrobe standing alone in a sparse room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am a young man. I own no perfume.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a row of plain shirts on a wardrobe rail, dim shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The scent was floral, powdery, warm, and very close.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of soft folded clothes on a wardrobe shelf, faint light, deep shadow behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It clung to my clothes and turned my stomach.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a shirt collar held up to dim light, fabric texture visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By noon it always faded completely, every single day.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an open wardrobe in bright midday light, clothes plain and still, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I washed everything and lined the shelves with new paper.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of fresh lining paper laid on empty wardrobe shelves, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next morning the perfume returned, stronger than before.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of an open wardrobe at dawn, hanging coats swaying slightly, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found a photograph wedged behind the back panel.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of hands sliding an old faded photograph from behind a wooden wardrobe panel, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: An old woman, smiling, standing in this very room.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a faded vintage photo of a room interior held in a hand, the figure turned away, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I burned the photograph and aired the room for days.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of ash in a metal bowl by an open window, grey daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now the perfume lingers on my pillow until noon.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a single pillow on an unmade bed in soft morning light, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing
